renderParams.comment: Dispatch render-video.yml with these inputs for the cinematic hero cut.

learningGoal: A first-time visitor understands what Prime Self gives them immediately, why it feels different, and why starting now is easy.
keyPoints: Prime Self turns your birth date, time, and location into a Free Energy Blueprint in seconds
You see your Energy Type, Strategy, Authority, defined centers, and gates without needing to decode chart jargon alone
The Synthesis combines Human Design, Frequency Keys, and natal astrology into one clear reading you can actually use
You can start free, get your chart fast, and keep going deeper with daily transits, relationship insight, and practitioner support
script:
Long before your first word, the pattern was already singing.

The hour you arrived, the sky took a position it will never take again. A chord struck once. Yours alone. It has been playing under everything since.

Human Design is how you finally hear it.

Nine centers. Sixty four gates. Channels of light strung between them like a circuit lit from within. Some defined, blazing, certain. Some open, drinking in the whole room.

Your Energy Type is the rhythm you move to. Your Strategy is how the doors swing open when you stop forcing them. Your Authority is the voice beneath the noise. It knew before you asked.

This is not a horoscope. This is your design, in full color.

You see it, and the room goes quiet. Not because you found an answer. Because you remembered the song you already were.

Prime Self builds your Free Energy Blueprint in seconds. No account. No cost.

Take the stage. Begin.

visualBeats: Birth data becomes a Free Energy Blueprint
Nine centers and sixty-four gates, translated
Type, Strategy, and Authority become usable
Not a horoscope. A map you can work with

toneNotes: High-style cinematic hero. Rendered via the EnergyBlueprintVideo composition with the phoenix forge atmosphere, gold theming, and a fully-lit flagship body-graph constellation (7 of 9 centers defined, G-center spotlit) so the chart blazes. Theatrical, anthemic, reverent — the register of a great stage performer mid-awakening — but fully inside brand law. Written for Eric: no em dashes, no ellipses, commas mark breath. Sentences stay under 18 words and vary for rhythm and crescendo. The revelation hook is the opening line in large gold kinetic type. The triad climax (Shadow / Gift / Siddhi) draws the gold underline. The final word, Begin, lands alone over the logo and selfprime.net.
previous_render_notes: v2.0 used the basic MarketingVideo composition, off-brand purple/green colors, and an em-dash-heavy script that degraded ElevenLabs narration. Superseded by the v3.0 high-style EnergyBlueprintVideo cut.
